hero.slide3Title: Mission and Service to the World

welcome.label: GREETING
welcome.title: Pastor's Welcome Message
welcome.para1: Welcome to the BongShin Church website.
welcome.para2: Our church is a community built on the Word of God, practicing worship, prayer, evangelism, missions, and love for neighbors.
welcome.para3: We warmly welcome everyone who comes. We pray that God's grace will be with your family.

greeting.para1: Shalom! Welcome to the BongShin Church website.
greeting.para2: Our church is a community built on the Word of God, practicing worship, prayer, evangelism, missions, and love for neighbors.
greeting.para3: We hope that the gospel of Jesus Christ will spread throughout the earth, and that BongShin Church will run together for the expansion of God's Kingdom.
greeting.para4: We warmly welcome everyone who comes. May the love and grace of the Lord be abundant in your home.

worshipInfo.notice1: Arriving 30 minutes early will enrich your worship experience.
worshipInfo.notice2: Please use the church parking lot.
worshipInfo.notice3: Those with young children may use the nursery room.

newMember.intro: Welcome to BongShin Church! Follow the steps below to become part of our church family.

1.title: First Visit
1.desc: Simply attend the Sunday service. Our ushers will be happy to assist you.

2.title: New Member Registration
2.desc: Fill out a new member card after the service and a staff member will contact you.

3.title: Welcome Reception
3.desc: You are invited to a new member welcome lunch after the service on the first Sunday of each month.

4.title: New Member Class
4.desc: Get to know the church better through our 6-week new member nurturing program.

5.title: Small Group Placement
5.desc: You will be connected to a district group or small group by area/age to begin community life.

directions.mapSub: Kakao Maps / Google Maps embed location

offering.intro: You can give offerings to the accounts below. Please include your name and offering type when transferring.
offering.arsSub: Follow the instructions after the call to give your offering.

infant.label: Infant Ministry
infant.description: The Infant Ministry is where children ages 0–2 first encounter God. We serve in a safe and warm environment so that children can feel loved.

toddler.label: Toddler Ministry
toddler.description: The Toddler Ministry is where children ages 3–4 learn and feel God's love. We plant seeds in children's hearts through praise and the Word.

kinder.label: Kindergarten Ministry
kinder.description: The Kindergarten Ministry is where children ages 5–7 learn the joy of worship. We build the foundation of faith through various activities and the Word.

elementary.label: Elementary Ministry
elementary.description: The Elementary Ministry is where elementary students get to know Jesus more deeply. We grow faith through systematic Bible education and various programs.

middle.label: Middle School Ministry
middle.description: The Middle School Ministry is where students establish their faith identity. Students are built up as disciples of Jesus Christ through the Word and community.

high.label: High School Ministry
high.description: The High School Ministry is where students discover God's calling. We raise the next generation of leaders through serious Bible study and prayer.

youth.label: Youth Community
youth.description: The Youth Community is where college students and young adults worship and grow together. Through the Word, prayer, and fellowship, we are built up to be salt and light in the world.

missionCenter.para1: The BongShin Church Mission Center supports domestic and international missionaries and trains congregation members interested in missions.
missionCenter.para2: We send short-term mission teams every year and operate programs for missionary children's education and sabbatical support.
